_comment: Paste the entries inside the hooks.UserPromptSubmit array of your ~/.claude/settings.json. Fires before every user turn — extracts durable learnings from the user's prompt + the previous assistant turn using rules-based regex. Appends matches to <cwd>/.agent-daemon/learning-journal.jsonl. The SessionStart hook drains the journal into memory at the next session. No LLM call, no Claude cooperation required. Latency <50ms.
